kpis.name: Creative passes
kpis.description: Number of assists, key passes, shot assists, and second assists adjusted by possession.

kpis.name: Crosses (xT)
kpis.description: Accumulated action-based xT of successful crosses adjusted by possession.

kpis.name: Passes (xT)
kpis.description: Accumulated action-based xT from open play passes adjusted by possession.

kpis.name: Passes into third (xT)
kpis.description: Accumulated action-based xT from successful open play passes into the final third.

kpis.name: Passes third (xT)
kpis.description: Accumulated action-based xT from successful open play passes inside of the final third.
